commentary_text: The model favors Australia at 35% while the sportsbook consensus favors USA at 54%, a 20-percentage-point gap on the USA win outcome. This gap may reflect real-money flows reacting to recent form, lineup availability, or injury status since the model's last update. The draw probability also splits notably—the model at 32% versus the market at 25%—suggesting the market perceives a clearer outcome than the statistical baseline. The dashboard flags this divergence as a signal worth monitoring; it does not indicate which assessment is more accurate.
